overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a robed character walking through Hogsmeade railway station on an overcast day. The character traverses wet cobblestone platforms, passes under a distinctive red footbridge, and walks through a wizarding village with timber-framed buildings before reaching an ornate iron gate exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: quiet railway platform with stone station building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone platform away from the stone station building

entered.detail: stone building with red door and white-framed windows
metal railway tracks running parallel to the platform
tall red lamp post with lantern top
low stone wall separating walkway from tracks

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a quiet, wet cobblestone platform beside a stone station building. The area is empty of people, with railway tracks running along the right side and forest visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy wizarding village platform with shops and red footbridge

events.description: entering the populated village area with timber-framed shops and NPCs
passing underneath the red stone footbridge

agents.ego_description: walking through the village platform passing NPCs and approaching the red footbridge

notable_agents.action: wizard in blue coat walking toward the camera
group of villagers browsing near shop entrance

entered.detail: ornate red and stone footbridge arching over the tracks
tall half-timbered building with white plaster and dark beams
red wooden structure resembling a train carriage or waiting shelter
stone wall with pillars separating platform from walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a populated village area with timber-framed shops lining the platform. NPCs walk in various directions as the character approaches and passes under a distinctive red footbridge. The atmosphere is lively with villagers browsing storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: platform passing under red bridge with cliffside buildings

events.description: character turns to look at the tall timber-framed building on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the bridge and pausing to look at the tall timber-framed buildings and cliff face on the right

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the opposite platform near the cliff

entered.detail: prominent four-story half-timbered house with steep roof
tall rocky cliff wall rising behind the village buildings
misty mountains visible in the distance beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the bridge, the character continues along the platform with a tall timber-framed house and rocky cliff face visible on the right. The character pauses to look around at the scenery before continuing toward the end of the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of platform with ornate iron exit gate

events.description: approaching the ornate iron gate marking the exit of the station

agents.ego_description: walking toward the ornate iron gate at the end of the platform

entered.detail: black wrought iron gate with decorative scrollwork between stone pillars
tall stone pillars supporting the iron gate
tall stone pillars supporting the iron gate
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the wall
high stone wall running along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the platform where an ornate iron gate stands between stone pillars. The area becomes quieter and more enclosed by stone walls, with wooden barrels stacked nearby as the character reaches the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate railway platform into the bustling heart of a wizarding village before concluding at a quiet stone exit. It begins with a character walking along wet cobblestones beside a silent station building, with empty tracks leading toward a distant forest. As the path progresses, the environment shifts into a lively village area where timber-framed shops line the way and NPCs populate the space, leading the character directly under a distinctive red footbridge. The scene then opens up to reveal a tall timber-framed house and a rugged cliff face on the right, where the character briefly pauses to take in the scenery. Finally, the camera follows the character as the crowd thins and the surroundings become more enclosed by stone walls and stacked wooden barrels, ending at an ornate iron gate set between stone pillars.
